framework.name: Explicitly No DIDs Required
framework.description: The draft deliberately avoids Decentralized Identifiers, relying instead on standard OAuth 2.0 + JWKS for identity. This is a design choice favoring enterprise identity providers and zero-trust architectures over decentralized identity stacks.
framework.raw_quote: enables secure, auditable delegation for autonomous AI Agent... without dependency on Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs)
